mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_target_selection_jobs ( hot_deal_id, status, max_retry_count ) SELECT #{hotDealId}, 'PENDING', #{maxRetryCount} FROM dual WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_target_selection_jobs WHERE hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, hot_deal_id AS hotDealId, status, retry_count AS retryCount, max_retry_count AS maxRetryCount FROM ( SELECT id, hot_deal_id, status, retry_count, max_retry_count FROM ai_target_selection_jobs WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR ( status = 'RETRY_WAIT' AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP) ) ORDER BY created_at, id ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT id, hot_deal_id AS hotDealId, status, retry_count AS retryCount, max_retry_count AS maxRetryCount FROM ai_target_selection_jobs WHERE hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_target_selection_jobs SET status = 'PROCESSING', started_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, failure_reason = NULL, next_retry_at = NULL, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND ( status = 'PENDING' OR ( status = 'RETRY_WAIT' AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP) ) )

UPDATE ai_target_selection_jobs SET status = 'COMPLETED', candidate_count = #{candidateCount}, selected_count = #{selectedCount}, inserted_count = #{insertedCount}, completed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, failure_reason = NULL, next_retry_at = NULL, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE ai_target_selection_jobs SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 <= max_retry_count THEN 'RETRY_WAIT' ELSE 'FAILED' END, next_retry_at = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 <= max_retry_count THEN SYSTIMESTAMP + NUMTODSINTERVAL( LEAST(5 * POWER(2, retry_count), 60), 'SECOND' ) ELSE NULL END, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE ai_target_selection_jobs SET status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 <= max_retry_count THEN 'RETRY_WAIT' ELSE 'FAILED' END, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 <= max_retry_count THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END, failure_reason = '애플리케이션 재시작으로 중단된 작업', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND ( started_at IS NULL OR started_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP - NUMTODSINTERVAL(10, 'MINUTE') )
